SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.commands

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.commands.CommandException

      class CommandException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • commandRequest
          CommandRequest<?,?,?> commandRequest
          A final and immutable variable that holds the CommandRequest associated with this exception.

          This field captures the command request that caused the CommandException to be thrown. It provides critical context for understanding and handling the exception, such as which command was being executed and the input data provided at the time the exception occurred.

          The CommandRequest encapsulates the command, its input, and its expected output types, making it an integral part of the exception's metadata.

  • Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions.LoadDataException

      class LoadDataException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • source
          Object source
          Represents the source or origin of the data that is associated with an exception. This field is used to provide context about the data or its origin that caused the exception. It is immutable and set at the time of exception construction.

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions.LoadDataFormatException

      class LoadDataFormatException extends LoadDataException implements Serializable

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.io.exceptions.LoadDataIOException

      class LoadDataIOException extends LoadDataException implements Serializable

      class EntityConflictException extends EntityException implements Serializable

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.exceptions.EntityException

      class EntityException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • query
          @Nullable Object query
          The query used for the entity that caused the conflict.
        • runtimeType
          @Nullable Class<?> runtimeType
          The runtime type of the entity that caused the conflict.

    • Exception Class io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.persistence.exceptions.EntityNotFoundException

      class EntityNotFoundException extends EntityException implements Serializable

          ScraperOwnedSpecificationStatus from
